title: Spotlight | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Spotlight
All Hands on Set: The Making of GATSBY SHANGHAICast and crew of Gatsby Shanghai give us the story behind their collaborative musical performance.
NYU Shanghai’s Business and Economics Honors Program: Tackling Research at the Graduate LevelThis year, NYU Shanghai’s Business and Economics Honors Program will graduate its eighth cohort.
Gender in Academia: Four Female Faculty Give Their TakeWe spoke to four female academics at NYU Shanghai in a variety of fields to learn more about their experie
Dialogue with Pierre Tarrès, Co-Director of the NYU-ECNU Institute of Mathematical Sciences at NYU Shanghai A robust and distinguished faculty team is broadening the spectrum of mathematics at NYU Shanghai.
When Getting Out of the Classroom Means Going into a Migrant Children’s School Eleven students spent J Term immersed in community-engaged ethnography in rural Guangdong.
What We Talk About When We Talk About GPSIt’s just after nine thirty on a Monday morning, and bleary-eyed first-year students stream into the East
We've All Failed Before: Faculty Words of Wisdom We've all failed before
What I’m Working On: Maya Kramer’s Arctic ExpeditionMaya Kramer fulfilled a longstanding goal of participating in the Arctic Circle Residency.
What I’m Working On: Yuan Yanyue’s Intergenerational Learning Project Yuan's lifelong pursuit is to enrich connections and collaborations between young and old.
Resident Assistants: Making NYU Shanghai A Home Away From HomeThree RAs share how they’ve made the role their own.
My Summer of Chinese: NYU Shanghai’s Mandarin Language Immersion ProgramAt NYU Shanghai’s annual Summer Chinese Language Immersion Program, 22 students took a language pledge.
My First Month at NYU Shanghai: Introducing the Class of 2027 Profiles of five NYU Shanghai first-year students.
Course Spotlight: Introduction to Math ModelingThis award-winning course is intended for those with a basic foundation in college mathematics.
Enjoying, Engaging, and Enlightening through Experience StudioIn the 2-credit Experience Studio courses, students have a chance to leave their laptops and desks behind.
What's it Like to be an NYU Shanghai Student Worker?Several recipients of this year's "Outstanding Student Worker" award share their campus job experiences.
